text:
Fails on i386 Stable 11. rev 323489:

      [-Werror,-Wmacro-redefined]
#define __fldcw(addr)   __asm __volatile("fldcw %0" : : "m" (*(addr)))
        ^

#define __fldcw(__cw)           __asm __volatile("fldcw %0" : : "m" (__cw))
